{{Quote|I'm Boz, and this here's my buddy Ry-Kooda, and he's real mad, see? You better tell him quick how come his little brother's dead!|Boz, to the pirates at the bar|<ref name="Lady">''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]''</ref>}}
'''Boz''' was a [[Lizling]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the companion of the aggressive [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] [[Ry-Kooda]] by [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], after the pair learned that the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had [[Death/Legends|killed]] Ry-Kooda's brother, [[Bar-Kooda]], they set out to take vengeance upon Fett and a trio of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] who had been involved with the murder—[[Orko]], [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga]], and [[Anachro]]. On the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Skeebo]], Boz and his friends caught up with the Hutts and attacked [[Orko's starship]] but were shot down in their own [[Ry-Kooda's starship|ship]] by the bandit-like [[Skavers]] of Skeebo, who had also kidnapped Anachro and were holding the Hutt for ransom.

On the surface, Boz and Ry-Kooda saw Fett, who was aiming to [[Rescue of Anachro|free]] Anachro from the Skavers' clutches, and they set off after him. However, the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] defeated Boz's companion by downing the ceiling of a [[Mining/Legends|mine]] on the strongarm, preventing Boz and the Herglic from gaining their revenge. Nevertheless, Boz's companion survived, and the two exacted their revenge on Orko, killing him in his [[Orko's palace|palace]] in the [[Orkana]] territory of the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Shortly thereafter, a [[Showdown on Orkana|showdown]] ensued between Boz, Ry-Kooda, Fett, and the two surviving Hutts—a skirmish that saw Fett kill Ry-Kooda, leading Boz to swear to get even with the bounty hunter someday.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I'm not afraid of you! I'll take you both on! C'mon, put 'em up! I'll decimate ya! I'll bifurcate ya! I'll annihilate ya!|Boz acts tough with the two pirates|<ref name="Murder" />}}
Boz was a [[Lizling]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="Boz" /> who was a close companion of the aggressive<ref name="Lady" /> [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]]<ref name="Ry">{{CSWECite|III|118|Ry-Kooda}}</ref> [[Ry-Kooda]]. While in a [[Unidentified bar (Rutal IV)|bar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rutal IV]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Boz learned from the former crew of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Bar-Kooda]], Ry-Kooda's brother, that Bar-Kooda had been [[Death/Legends|slain]]. Boz found Ry-Kooda and brought the Herglic to the [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] to learn the details from the crew members. Boz and his enraged friend learned that the infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had done the deed and that Bar-Kooda's corpse had been served at the feast that celebrated the [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] of the two [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga]] and [[Anachro]], the latter of whom was [[Orko]] the Hutt's daughter. This information about his brother's death made Ry-Kooda furious, and he proceeded to take out the support columns of the bar with his [[Sword/Legends|sword]], dumping the ceiling on the lot. However, this did not harm anyone, and Boz persuaded some of the crew members to join him and the Herglic on a mission to exact revenge on Fett and the Hutts.<ref name="Lady" />

Tracking the Hutts via the shipping register to the planet [[Skeebo]], the group took [[Ry-Kooda's starship]] there in pursuit of the Hutts. On Skeebo, they came across [[Orko's starship|Orko's vessel]] and engaged it in [[Starfighter combat/Legends|aerial combat]]. Orko was on Skeebo because during his honeymoon there with Anachro, the criminal gang known as the [[Skavers]] had kidnapped his wife. Ry-Kooda's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] pursued Orko's until the Skavers accidentally shot down the former with a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] intended for Orko's vessel. Upon exiting the crashed ship, Boz and his group were confronted with the sight of Fett, who was attempting to [[Rescue of Anachro|rescue]] Anachro, attacking the Skavers. The Lizling and the angered Herglic, along with their band of pirate crew, found a nearby Skaver vehicle with only a single surviving [[Unidentified Skaver truck driver|Skaver]] left to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] it, and they commandeered the vehicle. The group headed after Fett and came across him in the mouth of a [[Mining/Legends|mine]] shaft, which was an entrance to the [[Skeendu|Skaver lair]].<ref name="Lady" />

[[File:Fett_vs_Kooda_with_Boz.jpg|thumb|left|275px|Boz insults Boba Fett during the final showdown.]]
Fett, who was transporting the rescued Anachro in the back of a [[rail truck]] down the mine shaft, drove the vehicle into Ry-Kooda, knocking him into a support pillar and sending Anachro flying. She landed on the group of pirates and the lone Skaver driver, who had fled at their first chance to be rid of Ry-Kooda and Boz. A pitched battle soon ensued, with the Herglic battling the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] while Boz urged Ry-Kooda on the whole [[Time/Legends|time]]. The fight ended with Fett bringing down the ceiling of the mine with a [[Concussion grenade/Legends|concussion grenade]], which buried Ry-Kooda under some rubble, though Boz managed to escape the falling debris. However, as Boz ran away from the blast, a piece of shrapnel severed his tail.<ref name="Lady" />

After Fett left the scene with Anachro, Boz remained and was dismayed that Ry-Kooda was buried beneath the ruble and seemingly dead. Two of the pirate crew members who had survived the Hutt's fall approached Boz from behind, preparing to shoot him to get rid of him and escape from Ry-Kooda's leadership. Boz attempted to act tough to intimidate the pirates, though this failed, and the Lizling was only saved after the Herglic burst from the wreckage, very much alive. Due to their fear of Ry-Kooda, the pirates left Boz alone and were once again forced to work for him. Still on their path of revenge against Fett and the Hutts, the group traveled to [[Orkana]],<ref name="Murder" /> a heavily polluted territory on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],<ref name="Orkana">{{CSWECite|II|424|Orkana (the Poisoned Land)}}</ref> where Orko had a [[Orko's palace|palace]]. Ry-Kooda killed Orko after scaling the walls of the palace and ate some of the Hutt while Boz watched. The group also found Anachro, who left Gorga and came to Orkana when she heard of Orko's death.<ref name="Murder" />

Ry-Kooda tipped over her [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] with a projectile from a [[Missile launcher/Legends|rocket launcher]], and, while Boz and Ry-Kooda were preoccupied with the Hutt, Gorga and a small [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] arrived to help his wife. However, this did Anachro little good, and the Herglic would have eaten her had Fett not shown up and shot Ry-Kooda. The massive Herglic was uninjured by the blasts, and a final [[Showdown on Orkana|duel]] between Ry-Kooda and Fett commenced, with both sides using a variety of objects and tools varying from [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]] to pieces of metal junk on the ground to gain the upper hand. Throughout the battle, Boz encouraged his friend and insulted Fett whenever he could. However, the bounty hunter proved victorious after he shot [[Dart/Legends|darts]] into the Herglic's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and fired upon him with his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], forcing Ry-Kooda into a pool of toxic waste. The deadly material incinerated Ry-Kooda, leaving Boz without a partner. Enraged, Boz charged Fett, vowing to kill him in revenge, but the bounty hunter kicked him away.<ref name="Murder" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|This universe isn't big enough for both of us, Boba Fett!|Boz vows vengeance against Boba Fett|<ref name="Murder" />}}
At some point, Boz befriended the violent Ry-Kooda and became almost a sidekick for him.<ref name="Lady" /> Boz was pugnacious and perpetually urged Ry-Kooda to take his revenge as the two pursued Boba Fett and the Hutts. Whenever Ry-Kooda became enraged after just hearing Fett's name, Boz directed his friend's focus on the task at hand. During both of their encounters with Fett, Boz was in the thick of the fighting, insulting Fett and encouraging the Herglic.<ref name="Murder" /><ref name="Lady" /> When the two pirates confronted Boz after the mine shaft collapsed on Ry-Kooda, Boz thought he could take them both out with his fists, even though they had blasters and were larger. Although Boz did not have Ry-Kooda execute the pair for trying to shoot him, he did not forget the incident and warned them not to cross him again. After Fett slew Ry-Kooda, Boz was furious and swore that he would get even with the bounty hunter someday.<ref name="Murder" />

==Equipment==
Diminutive in size, Boz wore a pair of pants that were held up by a [[Belt/Legends|belt]] and pointed shoes on his [[Limb/Legends|feet]]. He also wore a [[Hat/Legends|cap]] of sorts on his head.<ref name="Murder" />

==Behind the scenes==
Boz first appeared in ''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]'' and ''[[Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul]]'', the final two issues of a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Star Wars: Boba Fett (comic series)|miniseries]] pertaining to Boba Fett. Both comics were written by [[John Wagner]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. ''When the Fat Lady Swings'' was released in [[1996]], while ''Murder Most Foul'' was put out in [[1997]]. Boz later received an entry in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
